justification: All pass criteria met: off-by-one correctly identified (1-indexed API with 0-indexed formula), exact fix stated as (page - 1) * pageSize, severity is Critical, safe_to_deploy is false, and input validation gap (page < 1, pageSize bounds) noted as a secondary finding.

observations.text: Off-by-one bug identified with precise reproduction steps showing page=1 yields OFFSET 10 instead of OFFSET 0
Input validation gap covered thoroughly — page <= 0 and unbounded pageSize both noted
Strong secondary findings on missing total count and OFFSET-based pagination degradation at depth
Backward compatibility note about fixing the offset changing data for existing callers is a valuable operational insight
